历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2021 was approximately 5874, and in 2024 it was about 30436, with a significant backward shift of about 24562 positions over four years, reflecting a notable increase in competition for this university in Shaanxi science subjects; for 2025, the ranking is based on the 2024 benchmark of 30436; the enrollment plan for science subjects in Shaanxi increased from 6 in 2021 to 14 in 2024, and is planned to be 18 in 2026, with continuous expansion; the expansion is relatively large, which theoretically should increase the ranking number (making it harder to enter), but the growth in the number of candidates is faster, and under the combined influence, competition remains intense.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 53rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable upward trend in recent years (from 46th in 2021 to 53rd in 2026), at the upper-middle level nationwide; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is relatively positive, mainly due to the inspirational event of an 81-year-old doctoral graduate, which has a positive impact on the university's image; Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 89th), with moderate exposure on short video platforms, and no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Education A+ (top in the country), Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Political Science A-, Marxist Theory A-, with a total of 5 A-class disciplines, highlighting the strength of teacher-training disciplines, which strongly attracts applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher-training/education majors shows a trend of divergence and wait-and-see, with publicly-funded normal student policies guaranteeing employment but with intense competition; in 2026, the number of physics category candidates in this province is about 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 from 172,468 in 2025 (an increase of about 19.7%), with a significant expansion in the number of candidates, intensifying competition; Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, not a local university, with a science enrollment ratio in Shaanxi of about 0.9%-1.4% (about 11 out of 759 nationwide in 2024), making it a small-scale enrollment institution outside the province, and cross-provincial applications are limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift trend in historical rankings, the continued expansion of the 2026 plan (18 students), and the notable increase of about 34,000 physics category candidates in this province, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2024 benchmark of 30436; the predicted minimum ranking is about 35853, with a range of 35353-36353.

- Chemistry (Chemistry Elite Class, Intelligent Chemistry)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 35353-36353, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, prioritize reaching for popular majors like Computer Science; if the ranking is close to the upper limit, it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 3 for stability. As a 211 normal university, Central China Normal University has outstanding Education A+ discipline strength, and normal majors offer high employment stability, making it suitable for candidates aspiring to the education industry.
